decision: Which metastasis vulnerability to advance into a translational program.
current_workflow: Literature review + internal target nominations + ad hoc bioinformatics.
failure_mode: Programs anchor on crowded/mechanistically-weak targets; metastatic-step context ignored.
why_current_tools_fail: Generic target databases are not organized by metastatic cascade step or perturbation design.
interception_input: Disease + metastatic step + candidate target universe.
interception_output: Step-specific hypothesis map + ranked target report with evidence contributions.
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Chooses which vulnerability to fund; owns go/no-go.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED (RUO; ranking is internal-consistency-scored, not clinically validated)

decision: Which targets from a broad universe enter validation first.
current_workflow: Manual triage of gene lists by essentiality/expression heuristics.
failure_mode: Too many candidates, no transparent per-model evidence trace; prioritization is opaque.
why_current_tools_fail: Single-axis scores (e.g. expression alone) miss evolutionary constraint + structural druggability.
interception_output: Ranked Target-Lock report: Evo2 + regulatory + AF3 contributions with uncertainty.
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Selects final candidate set for perturbation.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED (RUO; Enformer gated off, 0.689 prohibited, no external validation)

decision: Which guides to synthesize and screen for a locked target.
current_workflow: Design guides in a standalone tool; manually cross-check off-targets.
failure_mode: Design + off-target risk + structural confidence live in disconnected tools; slow, error-prone.
why_current_tools_fail: No single traceable package linking target rationale -> guide -> off-target -> structure.
interception_output: Ranked spacer/guide package + off-target risk records + AF3 receipts (experiment handoff).
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Chooses guides for synthesis; sets acceptable off-target risk; runs the screen.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED for design-risk review; NOT a wet-lab efficacy guarantee or safety certification

decision: Whether the sequence/structural evidence justifies the target hypothesis.
current_workflow: Runs Evo2/AF3-type analyses separately; hand-assembles evidence.
failure_mode: Evidence is not gated or version-controlled; risk of merging incompatible pipeline versions.
why_current_tools_fail: No governance layer distinguishing production (Enformer off, AF3 model 0) from benchmark descriptions.
interception_output: Evo2 sequence-signal trace + AF3 structural receipt with explicit version/gate flags.
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Interprets signals; decides if computational evidence is sufficient to proceed.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED (RUO; sequence interpretation, not pathogenicity diagnosis)

decision: Whether to commit wet-lab capacity/budget to a metastasis hypothesis.
current_workflow: Portfolio review of nominations with inconsistent evidence tiers.
failure_mode: Cannot compare hypotheses on a common evidence-tiered basis; savings claims unquantified.
why_current_tools_fail: No standardized decision package with explicit limits and mission-fit rationale.
interception_output: Mission-fit assessment + delivery-package recommendation (which of 3 packages).
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Approves spend and experimental scope; owns portfolio trade-offs.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED for prioritization; NO claim of years/millions saved (unmeasured — see note)

decision: Which experiments to run to validate the hypothesis.
current_workflow: Receives loosely-specified target nominations; designs assays from scratch.
failure_mode: Ambiguous handoff; unclear which experiment de-risks which assumption.
why_current_tools_fail: No structured experiment-handoff or prioritized validation roadmap.
interception_output: Validation Design Package: prioritized experiments with rationale.
human_experimental_decision_remaining: Executes and owns all wet-lab / functional validation and its interpretation.
claim_grade: SUPPORTED for design; validation OUTCOME is the partner's wet-lab result, not a CrisPRO claim
